p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 new pass_to_pass tests from repo CI: test_repo_lint_passes (pnpm nx run @tanstack/router-plugin:test:eslint), test_repo_types_pass (pnpm nx run @tanstack/router-plugin:test:types), test_repo_build_verification_passes (pnpm nx run @tanstack/router-plugin:test:build). All verified to exit 0 in Docker. Total p2p tests: 5 (2 existing + 3 new).

rubric_enrichment.rejection_reasons: 2 rules about plugin ordering (not applicable to HMR fix), 1 rule about PR workflow (not evaluable from diff)
